# Python Learning Resources (6)

> Official documentation, community tutorials, and Python web frameworks.

## Python Language

| Title | Type | Diff | Concepts | Author | Fresh | Off | Free | Lang |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [The Python Tutorial (Official)](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) | 📝 Tutorial | 🟢 | Language basics, OOP, Data structures, Getting started | Python Software Foundation | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🐍 |
| [Python Language Reference (Official)](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/) | 📋 API Ref | 🔴 | Language features, OOP, Memory management | Python Software Foundation | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🐍 |
| [PEP Index — Python Enhancement Proposals](https://peps.python.org/) | 📖 Docs | 🟡 | Clean code, Language features, API design | Python Software Foundation | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🐍 |
| [Real Python — Tutorials & Articles](https://realpython.com/) | 📝 Tutorial | 🟢 | Language basics, Testing, Concurrency, API design | Real Python / Dan Bader | 🔄 | ➖ | ✅ | 🐍 |
